arts.ttl: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany ready for “dangerous” VfB Stuttgart side
arts.sum: We’ve focused solely on that, we haven’t taken a single step less in our preparation because the game is very important for us,” said Kompany (as captured by BuLiNews.com ). Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany is not going to get caught looking ahead to next Wednesday’s Champions League showdown with Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Stuttgart v Bayern Munich Predicted Line-Ups: Key man sidelined for the Rekordmeister
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will be without Joshua Kimmich for their Bundesliga game at Stuttgart on Friday night. The 29-year-old missed the final training session on Thursday and will therefore not make…

arts.ttl: Training Report: Bayern Munich’s Dayot Upamecano could sit vs. VfB Stuttgart, Aleksandar Pavlović “fit”, but absent
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder Aleksandar Pavlović is said to be “fit”, but was not in training, which makes him a mystery man ahead of the VfB Stuttgart match — which might be a problem with Joshua Kimmich expected to miss the game: Jonathan Asp Jensen took part in the final training ahead of tomorrow's game pic.twitter.com/dc3UAd3m5x

arts.ttl: Stuttgart vs. Bayern Munich preview: Bavarians continue title push
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will continue their Bundesliga title push when they travel to MHP Arena for Friday’s Bundesliga clash with Stuttgart.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich’s pursuit of Rayan Cherki was delayed from January due to Cherki’s difficult character
arts.sum: Bayern maintain an interest in Rayan Cherki with a view to a summer move. Olympique Lyon’s unfortunate financial troubles, the source of the apparent need to sell homegrown talent Cherki, are no secret.

arts.ttl: A look at why Bayern Munich are the world's best-supported club as they move past 400,000 members
arts.sum: Founded in 1900 by members of a Munich gymnastics organisation disaffected with the body's decision to block footballers within the club joining the Deutscher Fussball-Bund [German Football Association], Bayern spent their formative years slowly making their way up the South German football league system, amid little fanfare. Bayern went on to win four league titles, four German Cups and three European Cups in Beckenbauer's 13 years in the first team, with a side that featured fellow 1974 world champions Sepp Maier in goal, Paul Breitner variously at left-back and midfield and Gerd Müller up front.
Bayern could be looking to add further talent to their ranks this summer.

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid on alert as Bayern Munich withdraw contract offer
arts.sum: Spanish football’s leading clubs have on Thursday been put on alert. This comes owing to developments behind the scenes at Bundesliga heavyweights Bayern Munich. As per a report from German…

arts.ttl: Stick or twist: Thomas Muller's future at Bayern is uncertain
arts.sum: The 35-year-old club legend's future is up in the air according to BILD and Der Spiegel.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich exploring potential Joshua Kimmich replacements
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Bayern Munich are already exploring the market for potential Joshua Kimmich alternatives, with the midfielder’s contract expiring in the summer. Earlier today it was revealed that Bayern…
